selected.rule: Drive smoke test: enter after CHoCH confirmation and FVG retest.
selected.rationale: Clear entry condition with CHoCH + FVG retest + liquidity sweep context; pairs naturally with the selected SL rule from the same source.

selected.rule: Stop loss below liquidity sweep wick.
selected.rationale: Clear stop placement tied to liquidity sweep wick; needed to make the entry variant testable with bounded risk.

ab_test_plan.baseline: Existing/manual EA behavior with the same symbol, timeframe, date range, spread, lot model, and risk settings, before adding selected candidate rules.
ab_test_plan.variant_a: Add only CHoCH confirmation + FVG retest entry and stop loss below liquidity sweep wick.
ab_test_plan.variant_b_optional_after_a: SRF ablation: compare Sell/Buy setup with SRF vs corresponding no-SRF setup after source-context review.
do_not_mix: fragmentary risk text such as above.
required_before_backtest: Open source notes for 58db7c3d4de1 and c87b0e657d98 to confirm exact entry/SL definitions.
Record symbol, timeframe, date range, initial deposit, lot sizing, max orders, spread, and pass/fail metrics.
Confirm no selected rule is blocked by pending high conflicts.
pass_fail_guardrails: Reject if drawdown increases materially without profit factor improvement.
Reject if total trades collapse below a meaningful sample for the chosen date range.
Reject any variant that requires no-SL/no-TP, grid, martingale, or unbounded averaging to work.
